parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.BEDRIJF_EMAIL, to: $('Webhook - Create Booking').first().json.email, subject: "Bevestiging: Discovery Call op " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.formattedDateTime, html: "

Jouw call is ingepland! ✅

Hoi " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.name + ",

Bedankt voor het inplannen van een discovery call met Runvex. We kijken ernaar uit!

Datum & tijd: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.formattedDateTime + "

Bedrijf: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.company + "

Dienst: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.service + "

Tot snel,
Team Runvex

" }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ from: $env.BEDRIJF_EMAIL, to: $env.MY_EMAIL, subject: "Nieuwe boeking: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.name + " – " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.formattedDateTime, html: "

Nieuwe discovery call ingepland

Naam: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.name + "

E-mail: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.email + "

Telefoon: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.phone + "

Bedrijf: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.company + "

Dienst: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.service + "

Datum & tijd: " + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.formattedDateTime + "

Vraag / project:

" + $('Code - Prepare Event').first().json.message + "

" }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, eventId: $('HTTP Request - Create Event').first().json.id }) }}
